message:
feat(gateway): Add setup wizard API endpoints

Implements setup wizard backend for toolchain readiness and installation:

Endpoints:
- GET /setup/readiness - Comprehensive readiness status with recommendations
- GET /setup/tools - List all known tools with install info
- GET /setup/tools/:name - Get specific tool info and status
- POST /setup/install - Install tool with WS progress events
- POST /setup/install/batch - Install multiple tools
- POST /setup/verify/:name - Force fresh detection of a tool
- DELETE /setup/cache - Clear detection cache

Features:
- Leverages agent-detection.service for CLI detection
- WebSocket progress events during installation (setup:install:progress)
- Idempotent install (skips if already installed)
- Easy mode for non-interactive installations
- Tool registry with install commands and documentation URLs

Tests are skipped by default (RUN_SLOW_TESTS=1 to enable) due to slow
CLI auth checks.

Part of: flywheel_gateway-xli

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
